questions.text: An angle that measures exactly 90 degrees is called a:
questions.explanation: A right angle measures exactly 90 degrees. It forms a square corner.

questions.text: Two lines that never meet are called parallel lines.
questions.explanation: Parallel lines are lines in the same plane that never intersect, no matter how far they are extended.

questions.text: What is the measure of a straight angle?
questions.explanation: A straight angle measures exactly 180 degrees. It forms a straight line.

questions.text: An angle smaller than 90 degrees is called an ________ angle.
questions.explanation: An acute angle measures less than 90 degrees but more than 0 degrees.
